mapper.sql: TEST_EVIDENCE_ID, PROJECT_ID, ISSUE_ID, TEST_NAME, TEST_TARGET, TEST_PROCEDURE, EXPECTED_RESULT, ACTUAL_RESULT, RESULT_STATUS, TESTER_ID, TESTED_AT, SCREENSHOT_FILE_NAME, SCREENSHOT_FILE_PATH, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT

TE.TEST_EVIDENCE_ID, TE.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, TE.ISSUE_ID, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, TE.TEST_NAME, TE.TEST_TARGET, TE.TEST_PROCEDURE, TE.EXPECTED_RESULT, TE.ACTUAL_RESULT, TE.RESULT_STATUS, TE.TESTER_ID, U.DISPLAY_NAME AS TESTER_NAME, TE.TESTED_AT, TE.SCREENSHOT_FILE_NAME, TE.SCREENSHOT_FILE_PATH, TE.CREATED_AT, TE.UPDATED_AT
mapper.update: UPDATE TEST_EVIDENCE SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, ISSUE_ID = #{issueId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, TEST_NAME = #{testName}, TEST_TARGET = #{testTarget}, TEST_PROCEDURE = #{testProcedure}, EXPECTED_RESULT = #{expectedResult}, ACTUAL_RESULT = #{actualResult}, RESULT_STATUS = #{resultStatus}, TESTER_ID = #{testerId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, TESTED_AT = #{testedAt}, SCREENSHOT_FILE_NAME = #{screenshotFileName}, SCREENSHOT_FILE_PATH = #{screenshotFilePath}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE TEST_EVIDENCE_ID = #{testEvidenceId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TEST_EVIDENCE TE INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON TE.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON TE.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN APP_USER U ON TE.TESTER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE TE.TEST_EVIDENCE_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
